positive: Stylized geometric astronaut silhouette floating in a vast, cosmic nebula. The astronaut is depicted in a clean, minimalist style with a striking, deep blue and cyan suit, contrasted against a gradient background of vibrant magenta, electric purple, and deep black space dust. The composition is highly centralized, featuring a clean, strong silhouette against a glowing, nebula backdrop. Artwork suitable for screen printing on apparel, with crisp lines, smooth transitions, and high contrast. Sci-fi, retro-futurism, graphic novel aesthetic, vector art quality, centered composition, digital illustration.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, artifacts, low resolution, low detail, poor quality
